chunks.title: Description of the Siege and Famine
chunks.reason: A continuous lament describing the physical devastation and extreme hunger during the siege.

chunks.title: Divine Judgment Explained
chunks.reason: An oracle explaining that Yahweh's wrath was poured out due to the sins of the prophets and priests.

chunks.title: The Failure of Human Hope
chunks.reason: A speech recounting the exhaustion of waiting for help and the capture of the anointed king.

chunks.title: Judgment on Edom and Zion
chunks.reason: A concluding oracle contrasting the end of Zion's punishment with the coming judgment on Edom.
